default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align GrowthX's prepared content plan with GC-AI's strategic direction and target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on in-house counsel (80-20 rule): Prioritize content for corporate/in-house counsel over law firms](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Topical relevance \> keyword volume: Emphasize niche, low-volume keywords specific to in-house counsel workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Research sources: Leverage In-House Connect, L Suite, and internal webinars for topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Content strategy: 90% wishlist-focused, 10% high-traffic potential for overall site ranking](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

## Topics

### SEO Audit Results

  - [Core web vitals passed with flying colors (site loads under 2 seconds)](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Minor on-page SEO issues: 55 pages with duplicate meta descriptions, some duplicate titles, few broken internal links](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [GC.AI ranking for \~200 keywords, mostly on page 5+](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [75%+ of traffic from branded search (GC.AI)](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Planning

  - [812 potential topics identified through competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Initial focus on AI and automation cluster due to relevance and potential ease of ranking](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Airtable workflow established for topic assignment and review](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### Target Audience Refinement

  - [Pivot from general legal AI keywords to in-house counsel specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Focus on daily tasks, specialties (e.g., compliance, contract types, vendor negotiations)](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Key personas: legal ops managers, product counsel, commercial counsel](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Prioritize topical relevance over search volume for first 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Utilize job-to-be-done (JTBD) analysis for key in-house counsel personas](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Mine keywords from Cecilia's webinars and prompting workshops](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Explore contract-related topics as a rich content area](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conduct additional research on General Counsel specific keywords and topics](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Develop a few calibration articles for approval](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Create a wishlist of desired content topics with the GC-AI team](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Begin content creation with 90% focus on wishlist topics, 10% on high-traffic potential topics](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Set up access to Google Search Console for more accurate keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/Qz39nsyvy_VPozdNRe9dpUqU5uj6pFKY?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

action_items.description: Add grouping for in-house counsel & corporate counsel keywords to Airtable
Conduct additional research on General Counsel specific keywords
Research job titles (legal ops managers, product counsel, commercial counsel) & JTBD for in-house legal teams
Analyze In-house Connect & L Suite websites for content ideas & trends
Prepare initial calibration articles for review
